Software Engineer • Angular Specialist

Building high-performance Angular experiences for commerce and marketing products.

Angular Developer with 3+ years of experience building scalable SPAs using Angular 15+, TypeScript, RxJS, and Angular Material. Proven track record of reducing page load times by 70%, cutting production bugs by 30%, and shipping 12+ features per sprint in Agile teams.

Download Resume Contact Me

Professional Summary

3+ Years

UI/UX-minded Angular Developer with 3+ years of experience building scalable SPAs using Angular 15+, TypeScript, RxJS, and Angular Material. Proven track record of reducing page load times by 70%, cutting production bugs by 30%, and delivering 12+ features per sprint in Agile teams.

  • Experienced in Node.js, PostgreSQL, REST API & GraphQL integration, and 85%+ unit test coverage with Jest/Jasmine/Karma.
  • Delivered reusable front-end architecture while improving accessibility and responsive performance.
  • Built high-impact applications for commerce and marketing workflows with international readiness.
Angular 15+ TypeScript RxJS Angular Material Node.js PostgreSQL

Professional Experience

Centizen, Inc.

Zenbasket Marketing Portal | Angular 15+, TypeScript, RxJS, REST APIs

Feb 2023 – Present

  • Launched a marketing portal from scratch as part of a 4-member Angular team, architecting a reusable component library that reduced feature development time by 25%.
  • Integrated Razorpay and Stripe payment gateways with multi-currency support, improving checkout conversion by 18%.
  • Refactored legacy Angular modules with lazy loading and bundle splitting, achieving a 20% improvement in UI rendering speed.

Centizen, Inc.

Zenbasket E-commerce Platform | Angular 15+, TypeScript, RxJS, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Sequelize

Jan 2025 – Present

  • Migrated a large legacy codebase to strict TypeScript, reducing production bugs by 30% and improving overall code robustness.
  • Designed and deployed 10+ reusable Angular components, services, and modules adopted across multiple teams.
  • Optimized the page load pipeline with modularization and lazy loading, slashing load times from 5s to 1.5s.
  • Delivered multilingual i18n support across 4 storefronts and built a real-time web push notification system with Service Workers.

Project Highlights

Angular Chat System

Real-time messaging without WebSockets

Designed a lightweight chat feature using RxJS observables and service workers to deliver instant messaging while reducing infrastructure overhead and keeping the experience smooth on the web.

E-commerce Core Modules

Checkout, order flows, customer management

Architected Angular modules for checkout, purchase management, customer data, and plan workflows, ensuring secure REST and GraphQL data flows from frontend to backend.
